file_structure.description: Namespace manifest for sigma1 with standard labels.
Namespace manifest for sigma1-db (or databases) with standard labels.
CloudNative-PG Cluster CR for sigma1-postgres with initdb bootstrap.
Kubernetes Job or Cluster CR postInitSQL for per-service roles and schemas.
CloudNative-PG Pooler CR for PgBouncer connection pooling.
Opaque Secret for PostgreSQL connection strings per service role.
Opaque Secret for Cloudflare R2 credentials.
Opaque Secret for Stripe API keys (placeholders).
Opaque Secret for external API keys (OpenCorporates, ElevenLabs, etc).
Opaque Secret for inter-service API keys.
ConfigMap aggregating all non-secret connection strings and endpoints.
Deployment and Service for Cloudflare Tunnel (cloudflared) for external access.
Kustomize component or ConfigMap for reusable Signal-CLI sidecar container spec.
Prometheus ServiceMonitor CR for sigma1 services.
Prometheus ServiceMonitor CR for sigma1-db (optional, for DB/Valkey).
NetworkPolicy allowing ingress from sigma1 to sigma1-db for PgBouncer/Valkey.

scaffolds.interfaces:
# No code interfaces for Bolt tasks; see YAML CRD structure below.
# Example: CloudNative-PG Cluster CR (partial)
# apiVersion: postgresql.cnpg.io/v1
# kind: Cluster
# metadata:
#   name: sigma1-postgres
#   namespace: sigma1-db
# spec:
#   instances: 2
#   storage:
#     size: 50Gi
#   bootstrap:
#     initdb:
#       database: sigma1
#       owner: sigma1_user
#       secret:
#         name: sigma1-postgres-superuser
scaffolds.function_signatures:
# Not applicable for Bolt (Kubernetes YAML) tasks.
# See YAML resource structure for each manifest.
scaffolds.test_stubs:
# Test Plan (not code):
# 1. kubectl get ns sigma1 -o jsonpath='{.metadata.labels}'
# 2. kubectl get cluster sigma1-postgres -n sigma1-db
# 3. kubectl exec into sigma1 pod, psql via pooler, \dn
# 4. redis-cli -u $VALKEY_URL PING
# 5. kubectl get configmap sigma1-infra-endpoints -n sigma1
# 6. kubectl get secret sigma1-db-credentials -n sigma1
# 7. kubectl get pods -n sigma1 -l app=sigma1-cloudflare-tunnel
# 8. kubectl get servicemonitor -n sigma1
# 9. kubectl get networkpolicy -n sigma1-db
